theme_and_archetype.description: A premium, dark-by-default SaaS aesthetic tailored for developer tools and startups. Characterized by deep obsidian backgrounds, 1px subtle white borders, stark white typography, and a single, vibrant neon accent (Electric Indigo) for interactive and AI-driven elements.

accent.description: Use sparingly for AI sparkles, Idea Scores, and critical 'magic' actions.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard, but scaled up (e.g., p-8 for cards, py-24 for sections). Containers with borders MUST have p-6 or p-8.

grid_strategy.dashboard: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. gap-6. Every pixel utilized. h-full on children.
grid_strategy.landing: MODE A: THE TETRIS GRID. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Asymmetry and wide spans (e.g., col-span-8, col-span-4).

layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, inputs, and dense content. Headings can be centered in marketing hero, but strictly left-aligned in dashboard and forms.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Glassmorphism: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10. Sticky top z-50.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: Flat background (bg-zinc-950), 1px subtle border (border-white/10), no shadow. Hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-xl shadow-black/50, border-white/20.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.ai_elements: The Tracing Beam: For 'Generate Build Plan' or Idea Score cards, use an animated gradient border or subtle drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(99,102,241,0.5)].
surfaces_and_micro_themes.inputs: bg-zinc-900 border border-white/10 text-white focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500 rounded-md.

buttons.primary: bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-500 text-white font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-md transition-all hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(99,102,241,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/10 hover:border-white/30 text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-md transition-all
buttons.ai_magic: bg-indigo-600 border border-indigo-400/50 text-white hover:bg-indigo-500 relative overflow-hidden

components.badges: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-mono border
components.shadcn_overrides: Do NOT use default Shadcn border radius. Use rounded-md (6px) or rounded-lg (8px). Do NOT use card component for marketing pages, use raw divs.

landing_page.hero: H1 text-6xl+, centered, overline above it. Abstract dark geometric background image heavily masked (bg-black/80) or with gradient overlay so text pops. 'Start Building' (Primary CTA) and 'View Demo' (Secondary).
landing_page.features: Bento grid layout. Use Lucide icons. Sections for Idea Validation, MVP Planning, Tech Stack, Risk Detection.

auth.layout: Split screen. Left: Form. Right: Abstract code screen image or inspiring startup team image with black/50 overlay.

dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (left) + main content area. Strict grid hierarchy. 'Project Cards' showing title, goal type badge, status badge, last updated. Open button on hover.
dashboard.cards: Use 'Control Room' grid styling. Flat, dense, highly scannable.

create_project.layout: Multi-step or long-scroll multi-field form. Wide, single-column container max-w-3xl to ensure readability.
create_project.fields: idea textarea, target user, problem, goal type, skill level, timeframe, preferred tech, team size, constraints, notes.
create_project.cta: 'Generate Build Plan' button with AI glow effect.

project_detail.layout: Bento grid for plan sections. Idea score as a prominent widget (Top Right) with circular progress percentages.
project_detail.sections: Refined Name, Pitch, Problem Statement, Target Users, MVP Features, Nice-to-haves, Tech Stack, 4-Week Roadmap, Risks, Ethics, Next 3 Actions, Idea Score (feasibility/originality/market potential, build difficulty).

media.icons: lucide-react (Use for dashboard and standard actions)

hero_bg.description: Abstract dark wavy shapes. Use as landing page hero background with heavy black gradient overlay (bg-black/80).

auth_bg.description: Colorful programming code on dark screen. Use on right side of Auth split-screen, with overlay.

feature_bg.description: Texture of contemporary futuristic building. Use subtly inside bento grid feature cards as bg-image with opacity-10.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on role (e.g., data-testid='generate-plan-button').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text must meet 4.5:1 ratio. Hover states must explicitly set text color.

instructions_to_main_agent: Start by setting up Tailwind CSS variables in index.css matching the color_palette.
Add Google Fonts link to index.html and configure tailwind.config.js font families.
Install lucide-react, framer-motion, and shadcn/ui components: button, card, input, textarea, select, badge, progress.
Use .js/.jsx extensions for all files, NOT .tsx/.ts. Ensure proper prop drilling and no TypeScript types.
Implement navigation bar with glassmorphism surface.
Ensure the application strictly follows the Dark Theme / High-Contrast Swiss archetype.
